aries.horoscope_text: Be adventurous and strike out into new territory, Aries. Be a pioneer. Work to make some new discoveries in the world. Today isn't a day to worry about consequences. It's a day to get things started. There is a great deal of fiery energy in the cosmos helping you in your quest for the new and fresh. Take the lead and try not to get thrown off course by leeches and party poopers.
aries.deploy_today: Yes — You're a pioneer. Pioneers don't wait for QA.
aries.prophecy: The stars say be a pioneer today. Your PR has been in review since the pioneer era.

taurus.horoscope_text: Certain situations may be difficult to deal with today as they take an emotional spin, Taurus. You're getting anxious. Things are getting started without the careful planning and consideration you feel is necessary. Try not to worry so much. Your own doubt is likely to hinder any project. Have faith that things will work out. Be bold. Take an active role in helping to get the ball rolling instead of holding it back.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars say have faith. Your gut says rollback plan.
taurus.prophecy: The stars say stop doubting yourself and just push. Your doubt has saved production three times this month.

gemini.horoscope_text: You should find that the general mood of the day is favorable to your personality style, Gemini. Take this opportunity to present more of your thoughts and ideas to the world. Let your voice be heard. Use it with strength and vigor. You have partners and friends who are eager to hear what's on your mind. Engage in verbal sparring. You'll find that you can learn a great deal about yourself and others.
gemini.deploy_today: Yes — Mood is favorable and partners are eager. Nobody specified for what.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say let your voice be heard with strength and vigor. You will have three opinions in standup. The team will move on after the first one.

cancer.horoscope_text: The fog has lifted and you're ready to take off, Cancer. The dreaminess you may have experienced lately has been nice, but now it's time to get moving again. Use all that you have learned from that recent internal processing and put it to use in the practical world. Try not to get caught up in the crossfire of conversations that don't really pertain to you. Feel free to start something new.
cancer.deploy_today: Yes — The fog has lifted. You can finally see the error logs.
cancer.prophecy: The fog has lifted. You can now clearly see the 14 Jira tickets that accumulated while you were processing internally.

leo.horoscope_text: This is a terrific day for you, Leo, and you'll find that there is a great deal of power at your disposal. This is a day of new beginnings. You have the opportunity now to start over and create a solid emotional base from which to work. Rid yourself of negative feelings and self-doubt. Use this day as an opportunity to strike out on new ground and achieve whatever you set your heart on.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Power at your disposal. AWS bill not included.
leo.prophecy: The stars say achieve whatever you set your heart on. Your heart is set on that critical ticket from January. It has no description and no acceptance criteria.

virgo.horoscope_text: The fire is raging today, so be careful, Virgo. Try not to be too impulsive in your actions. Your natural tendency may be to lash out against others without really thinking about the consequences. If you find yourself getting hot under the collar, you might need to take a step back from the situation and settle down. Pursue your goals, but make sure that you don't do so at the expense of others.
virgo.deploy_today: No — The fire is raging. That applies to your pipeline too.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say step back and cool down. Someone left a comment on your PR that says 'nit'. You are not cooling down.

libra.horoscope_text: Go for the gold, Libra. Today marks the beginning of the rest of your life. Treat it with respect. You may be on a crusade and your combative instincts could be working overtime. There's a lot of fuel in your engine, so don't worry about running out. The only thing you really need to be concerned about is possibly stepping on other people's toes. Make sure you consider how your actions affect others.
libra.deploy_today: Yes — You're on a crusade. Nobody told you what day it is.
libra.prophecy: The stars say go for the gold but mind whose toes you step on. You will push directly to main. Several toes will be stepped on. 🙃

scorpio.horoscope_text: You may feel as if someone is poking you today, Scorpio, urging you to get up and get moving. Don't be surprised if someone seems to be picking on you for no reason. Other people's lack of sympathy and sensitivity could be acute on a day like this. Try not to take it personally. Your hard outer shell may be put to the test in terms of its ability to protect your soft vulnerability.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Someone is already picking on you for no reason. Don't give them something real.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say don't take it personally. Someone will comment on your code with just 'why?' with no further context. You will take it very personally.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: This is a great day for you to get up on stage and make your presence known, Sagittarius. Let people know that you're the leader of the pack. There is a great need for you to take the helm now, and you shouldn't back away from this responsibility. The warrior instinct inside you is probably strong, so don't hesitate for a second. Be brave and courageous in all situations.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — The warrior instinct is strong. Warriors don't wait for UAT.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say take the helm and make your presence known. Your camera is off. The helm is unattended.

capricorn.horoscope_text: This is a good day to add spark to your life, Capricorn. If things have seemed boring and stagnating lately, you may need to infuse a bit of excitement into the situation. Add flair and dynamism to the mix. Take matters into your own hands and actively pursue your goals. You have a strong inner sense of where you need to go. Trust your instincts and move in that direction. Don't hesitate.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Things have been stagnant. Deploying is the most exciting thing that will happen this sprint.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say add flair and dynamism. You will add a console.log. You will call it flair.

aquarius.horoscope_text: You'll notice that your emotions are coming to a monthly climax today, Aquarius. Don't be alarmed but do be cautious about lashing out at people for no reason. You may feel on edge. Unintended slights from others could push you over that edge in a fury of emotion. Harsh words spoken today can damage other people's feelings for a long time, so remain silent.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — Emotional climax and harsh words. Keep your cursor away from the deploy button.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say remain silent today. The stars have clearly never been in a Slack thread about variable naming conventions.

pisces.horoscope_text: Extremes is the name of the game now, especially for you, Pisces. Today the emphasis is on action. You're the one to call to get the job done. You won't wait another second to simply go for it. Your emotions are flowing, and you have an endless well of internal strength and resources. Use this power to your advantage. Connect with others who share similar viewpoints, and watch the incredible results unfold.
pisces.deploy_today: Yes — You're the one to call to get the job done. Godspeed. 🫡
pisces.prophecy: The stars say you're the one to call to get the job done. Fifteen Slack messages later, the job has been thoroughly discussed. 🫡
